item.title: Subway Sandwich Challenge
item.description: A fun food challenge inspired by a sandwich made faster than it could be prepared. Quick, playful, and all about the challenge experience.

media:content.media:title: Subway Sandwich Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge inspired by a sandwich made faster than it could be prepared. Quick, playful, and all about the challenge experience.

item.title: Undefeated Waffle Challenge
item.description: A fun waffle challenge with a big portion and plenty of flavor. Watch the challenge unfold in a lighthearted, food-focused setting.

media:content.media:description: A fun waffle challenge with a big portion and plenty of flavor. Watch the challenge unfold in a lighthearted, food-focused setting.

item.title: Fast Food Meets Fast Mouth at Lum's BBQ
item.description: A fun BBQ challenge at Lum's BBQ Junction in Texas, featuring fast food, big portions, and a lively outdoor eating experience.

media:content.media:title: Fast Food Meets Fast Mouth at Lum's BBQ
media:content.media:description: A fun BBQ challenge at Lum's BBQ Junction in Texas, featuring fast food, big portions, and a lively outdoor eating experience.

item.title: Can I Finish This Before Time Runs Out?
item.description: A fun food challenge with a race against the clock and plenty of flavor to enjoy.

media:content.media:title: Can I Finish This Before Time Runs Out?
media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge with a race against the clock and plenty of flavor to enjoy.

item.title: Giant Burrito Challenge
item.description: A fun burrito challenge focused on a giant portion and the question of whether it can be finished.

media:content.media:description: A fun burrito challenge focused on a giant portion and the question of whether it can be finished.

item.title: Campfire Dessert in North Carolina
item.description: Cooking the perfect dessert over a campfire in North Carolina, with a cozy outdoor food moment and a simple nature-inspired treat.

media:content.media:description: Cooking the perfect dessert over a campfire in North Carolina, with a cozy outdoor food moment and a simple nature-inspired treat.

item.description: A massive octuple bypass burger challenge with big flavor and a fun competitive eating vibe.

item.title: Who’s the Fastest Eater?
item.description: A fun food challenge asking who can finish first. Simple, competitive, and all about the meal and the moment.
